name: raycast-filegarden
title: FileGarden
description: Raycast extension for managing FileGarden uploads
author: wesleycoder

commands.name: screenshot
commands.title: Take Screenshot
commands.subtitle: Upload screenshot to FileGarden
commands.description: Take a screenshot, upload it to FileGarden and copy the URL to the clipboard

commands.name: browse
commands.title: Browse FileGarden
commands.subtitle: View all uploaded files
commands.description: Browse all uploaded files on FileGarden

preferences.name: screenshotsFolderId
preferences.title: Screenshots Folder ID
preferences.description: The ID of the folder where screenshots will be uploaded
